bird.name: Bridled sparrow
bird.summary: The bridled sparrow (Peucaea mystacalis) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. It is endemic to Mexico.

relations.subject: Bridled sparrow
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "No effects of human activity on Bridled Sparrow are documented, although it presumably is vulnerable to habitat degradation or loss."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
